category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes tag as a command-line tool to manipulate tags on Mac OS X files and query files with those tags.
source_facts.description says it manipulates and queries tags on macOS files.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name is jdberry/tag.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/jdberry/tag, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository describes it as a command-line Mac OS X file tag tool.
source_facts.description identifies manipulating and querying tags on macOS files.
